connect.low: Grab a by.U SIM or the cheapest data pack; maximize free cafe WiFi around YIA.
connect.medium: Get a 15–18 GB Telkomsel/XL SIM for stable coverage over 48 hours.
connect.high: Activate a premium Telkomsel eSIM + unlimited plan; keep a pocket WiFi as backup.

workspace.cafe: Find a quiet cafe with WiFi & outlets; arrive 9–11 AM before the crowd.
workspace.coworking: Book a dedicated desk at a coworking space; check day passes & meeting rooms.

msme.low: Try geblek, tempe benguk & coffee at an angkringan — full under Rp 25,000.
msme.medium: Eat at popular local warungs & try growol; budget Rp 40,000–80,000.
msme.high: Enjoy specialty coffee & a lakeside restaurant at Sermo Reservoir.

transport.low: Take the DAMRI bus or YIA Airport Train to the city — most economical.
transport.medium: Order Gojek/Grab for flexibility; mix with local ojek.
transport.high: Rent a car with driver or an official airport taxi for full comfort.

explore.low: Glagah Beach & lagoon — free/cheap, perfect to recharge.
explore.medium: Kalibiru or Sermo Reservoir; prepare entry & boat tickets.
explore.high: Guided Kalibiru tour + Suroloyo sunset with private transport.
